purpose: Conformance and telemetry index for the closure-gate evidence enforcement originally landed under bd-4rl (closed 2026-02-11; audit pass 2026-05-10T03-16-16Z scored 470/1000 because the deterministic spec-extractor and evidence-gatherer couldn't link tests.unit.primary, tests.e2e.primary, tests.conformance.primary, or telemetry.primary). This sibling manifest names the existing artifacts at file path so the next audit pass can attach evidence.

telemetry_emission_contract.stdout_summary_contract: Final summary line includes total/exempt/pass/fail/warn counts with non-zero fail count producing exit 1.
telemetry_emission_contract.exit_code_contract: exit 0 means all non-exempt closed beads have complete evidence; exit 1 means one or more failed; warnings (legacy exempt) do not fail the gate.
telemetry_emission_contract.rationale: scripts/check_closure_gate.sh emits a deterministic stdout summary plus per-bead diagnostics. Downstream gates consume the exit code as the canonical telemetry signal that bd closures carry full evidence.
